zh.lifeSummary: Albreda Steyngrave是William Steyngrave的女兒，於1244年出生。她於1264年與Hugh FitzHenry在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯結婚。她去世於1302年1月在英國達勒姆賀沃--斯享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Albreda Steyngrave是William Steyngrave的女儿，于1244年出生。她于1264年与Hugh FitzHenry在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯结婚。她去世于1302年1月在英国達勒姆賀沃--斯享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Albreda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Elfreda  , but now probably taken as a feminine equivalent of   Alfred .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Albreda Steyngrave was born in 1244 as the daughter of William Steyngrave. She married Hugh FitzHenry in 1264, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She died in January 1302, in Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Albreda Steyngrave est née en 1244, fille de William Steyngrave. Elle a épousé Hugh FitzHenry en 1264, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en janvier 1302, à Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.Kentwell Hall, Long Melford, Suffolk, En: Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Albreda Steyngrave wurde 1244, als Tochter von William Steyngrave geboren. Sie hat 1264 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Hugh FitzHenry geheiratet. Sie starb im Januar 1302 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Albreda Steyngrave è nata il nel 1244 come figlia di William Steyngrave. Lei sposato Hugh FitzHenry nel 1264, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel gennaio 1302, nel Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Albreda Steyngraveは1244年にWilliam Steyngraveの娘として生まれた。1264年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスでHugh FitzHenryと結婚した。彼女は1302年1月にイギリスダルハムハルウオルス-オン-ティーズで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Albreda Steyngrave(은)는 1244년 William Steyngrave의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1264년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 Hugh FitzHenry(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1302년 1월 영국 뒤람 허워스--티스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Albreda Steyngrave nasceu em 1244 filha de William Steyngrave. Ela casou-se com Hugh FitzHenry em 1264, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1302, em Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Albreda Steyngrave родилась в 1244 г. Её отца звали William Steyngrave. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh FitzHenry в 1264 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла январь 1302 г. в местности хурворт-он-тись, дурам, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Albreda Steyngrave nació en 1244 como hija de William Steyngrave. Se casó con Hugh FitzHenry en 1264, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en enero de 1302, en Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
